mechanism_narrative: A positive trend in retail sales captures resilient household demand and near-term revenue momentum for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when RSAFS growth is evaluated continuously.
evidence_refs: series:RSAFS
fact:latest RSAFS value is 370495.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by lower 20-day S&P 500 returns with Rank IC below -0.03 over two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses into a restrictive zone, equity discount rates rise faster than expected cash flows, compressing valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
fact:latest FEDFUNDS value is 5.26 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations with FEDFUNDS above 4.5% produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases over a walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals deteriorating labor income and rising recession risk, reducing expected corporate revenues and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
fact:latest UNRATE value is 4.5 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if unemployment-spike triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of triggered cases, or if mean triggered return exceeds the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer prices combined with an already high federal funds rate signals persistent inflation pressure under restrictive policy, extending tightening expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month growth is positive and FEDFUNDS is above 5.0%
evidence_refs: series:CPIAUCSL
series:FEDFUNDS
fact:latest CPIAUCSL value is 203.153 as of t-2mo
fact:latest FEDFUNDS value is 5.26 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL-positive-growth and FEDFUNDS-above-5.0% trigger has no lower 20-day return than either single-series condition in a walk-forward interaction test.

mechanism_narrative: A rising industrial production trend indicates improving physical output and operating leverage, supporting earnings revisions and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:INDPRO
fact:latest INDPRO value is 111.9282 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if higher 6-month INDPRO growth fails to rank future 60-day S&P 500 returns positively, with Rank IC below 0.03 in more than half of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A downside break in housing starts signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction activity, reducing cyclicals' earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:HOUST
fact:latest HOUST value is 1408.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST-below-1300 triggers are not followed by below-median 60-day S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of triggered historical observations.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth alongside falling retail sales signals labor-cost stickiness against weakening final demand, compressing margins and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and RSAFS 3-month change is negative
evidence_refs: series:PAYEMS
series:RSAFS
fact:latest PAYEMS value is 137410.0 as of t-1mo
fact:latest RSAFS value is 370495.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and RSAFS-down condition does not produce lower 20-day returns than periods where both series rise, measured over walk-forward folds.

mechanism_narrative: A high policy rate with unemployment still below stress levels signals a soft-landing carry regime in which recession fears are contained, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is above 5.0% and UNRATE is below 5.0%
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
series:UNRATE
fact:latest FEDFUNDS value is 5.26 as of t-1mo
fact:latest UNRATE value is 4.5 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the FEDFUNDS-above-5.0% and UNRATE-below-5.0% interaction produces negative average 5-day S&P 500 returns or underperforms the unconditional 5-day mean by more than 10 basis points.
